import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

config = {
    "database_url": "postgresql://user:secret123@localhost/mydb",
    "api_key": "sk-abc123def456",
    "redis_password": "redis_secret_pass",
    "debug": True,
    "max_connections": 10,
}


def initialize_service():
    logger.debug("Starting with config: %s", config)
    logger.info("Service initialized")


def health_check():
    logger.debug("Current config state: %s", config)
    return {"status": "ok"}
